bhabanipur.legal: VERIFIED (Local Rulebook): Bhabanipur Phase 2 polling active. Section 144 enforced within 100m radius.
bhabanipur.advice: Booth at St. Johns School is OPEN. Carry valid ID. Mobile phones strictly prohibited inside the booth.

ration_card.legal: ECI MANUAL 2026: Ration Cards are NOT valid standalone IDs for identity verification at the polling booth.
ration_card.advice: Voters must carry EPIC (Voter ID) or one of the 12 govt-approved photo IDs (Aadhaar, PAN, etc.).

chennai.legal: STATE STATUS: Tamil Nadu Phase 1 concluded on April 23. Current status: Strongroom Security Phase.
chennai.advice: Generating historical booth data for mission records. Monitor official counting updates on May 4.

campaigning.legal: MCC VIOLATION: Rule 4.2 states that campaigning within 100m of a polling booth is a non-bailable offense on election day.
campaigning.advice: Incident report draft generated. Please submit via cVIGIL app or to the sector officer immediately.

tamil_nadu.legal: CONTEXT SYNC: Regional database updated to Tamil Nadu (Phase 1 focus). ECI Rulebook TN-2026 active.
tamil_nadu.advice: Mission: 'Post-Poll Vigilance'. Maintain awareness of counting day security protocols.
